description: Token optimization tiers. Controls what gets loaded into AI agent context and when.

0.label: Always loaded
0.description: Loaded into every agent session automatically. Must stay compact.

1.label: Trigger-loaded
1.description: Loaded when task matches trigger keywords in manifest.json. Read summary first; load full SKILL.md only if needed.

2.label: On-demand
2.description: Loaded only when explicitly requested by user or protocol. Reference docs, agent personas, protocols.

simple.description: Single-file edit, small fix, quick question

feature.loadStrategy: full-skill for primary, summary for secondary

audit.description: Code review, quality audit, full compliance check

steps: 2. Agent identifies task type → selects budget (simple/feature/audit)
3. Agent matches task keywords against manifest.json triggers
4. Agent reads manifest summary for matched skills (5-line digest)
5. Agent reads full SKILL.md only for directly relevant skills
6. Agent loads tier-0 rules always; tier-1 rules if task touches that area
7. Protocols/agents loaded only when orchestration or self-expansion needed
